steps.title: Identify the sentence's job
steps.content: The underlined sentence defines two kinds of gene transfer. It explains horizontal gene transfer by placing it beside vertical gene transfer and using the contrast phrase on the other hand.

steps.title: Match the structural description
steps.content: Choice B points to a flawed perception, but the underlined sentence does not correct a belief. Choice C mentions future research, which is absent. Choice D says the sentence stresses similarity, while it mainly contrasts the processes. The answer is A.
